sub: Six years writing the code that processes money. This is the short version of what I care about and how I work.

cards.title: What I do best
items: Banking & payment integrations that don't lose rows.
Large database migrations with validation you can trust.
Security hardening until the VAPT report is boring.
Cloud & Docker environments that QA actually enjoys.

cards.title: How I work
items: Read the logs first. The system already knows what's wrong.
Small, reversible changes. Especially at 3 AM.
Write the playbook. If I solved it twice, it gets a doc.
Default to boring tech. Novelty is a last resort.

cards.title: Currently
cards.body: Software Engineer at Veefin Solutions — leading backend work on a supply chain finance platform used by Indian banks. Previously at Tripegate (2020–2023), building a multi-tenant travel & expense SaaS.

cards.title: Education & off-hours
items: B.Sc. Computer Science & Engineering — Institute of Science and Technology, 2019.
Mozilla Foundation — early-stage build testing & bug reports.
BNCC (Bangladesh National Cadet Corps) — discipline, coordination.

cards.title: Let's work.
cards.body: Remote-friendly. Fluent in English & Bengali. Available for senior backend, platform or fintech engineering roles.
